programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: When a surprise threatens to spoil Castle and Beckett's wedding day, they must set out on a wild mission filled with masked men and angry bikers.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Kate Beckett is faced with the toughest case of her career after finding Castle's car engulfed in flames.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team must play a dangerous war game that leads to very real consequences for one team member.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is forced to rely on information from questionable sources while trying to stop a criminal bent on stealing government secrets.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a petty officer and discovers he may have been leading a violent secret life.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is forced to put in overtime while searching for a suspect presumed dead when working on a case over Christmas.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee is held captive in a women's prison after a guard's murder leads to a takeover.

programme.desc: After Ducky is stabbed at a crime scene, the team uncovers disturbing secrets from the doctor's past.

programme.title: Have Thinning Hair? Keranique Can Help Regrow Beautiful, Thicker Hair!
programme.desc: If you have thinning hair or hair loss, Keranique can help regrow thicker, longer and fuller hair. Keranique is the number 1 hair regrowth system for women. Regain your confidence with beautiful, thicker and fuller hair in just 3 easy steps!

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. During the month of December, "Turning Point" usually features special Christmas programming.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: Dr. Creflo Dollar ministers to people from all backgrounds with hopes for change; Creflo helps viewers find ways to renew their faith, mind, and spirit; based on the belief that the Bible is the written and inspired Word of God, the show is meant to invoke change in the lives of people across the globe; Creflo and his wife, Taffi, share their vision for everyone to hear the Word and gain understanding of God's love and promises.

programme.title: Life Today With James Robison
programme.desc: James Robison is a former preacher who changed directions in his life several years ago and began hosting this television show alongside his wife, Betty, in order to reach out to help more people. This daily religious and self-help program welcomes guests who tell how they have successfully overcome difficulties in their lives by following God's word -- with the hope of encouraging others to do the same and look to God for help and guidance in times of need. The Robisons provide viewers with Bible-based advice to help them deal with everyday problems.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Noted for her humanitarian ministry efforts to aid suffering people around the world, Bible teacher Joyce Meyer reaches out to both Christians and non-Christians as she illustrates how to make each day better by applying biblical principles to every activity.

programme.title: The Balancing Act
programme.desc: Simple plant-based meals; sustainable fashions made with Merino wool; spring cleaning with Color Scents.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Demons of the past come back to haunt Gibbs when he finds a cryptic message waiting for him at a crime scene.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A murder prompts the reopening of one of Tony's old investigations, leading Gibbs and DiNozzo to reverse roles to solve the case.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When an agent is gunned down, Gibbs and Tony try to locate a woman in the desert who might have answers about his murder.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A boxer's death leads to Vance starting his own investigation; Gibbs looks into Vance's past.

programme.desc: A military family comes under suspicion when a boy finds a murder weapon and the team must track ownership of the gun.

programme.desc: Gibbs reluctantly works with Trent Kort (David Dayan Fisher) to put away one of the department's most-wanted criminals.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When Abby is asked to take over for a government scientist who has gone missing, the team fears that she will meet the same fate as her predecessor.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The murder of a Marine brings McGee and Gibbs to Los Angeles for a joint investigation with the NCIS office of special projects; Tony looks into Ziva's personal life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony questions Ziva's loyalty to NCIS; Special Agent Callen (Chris O'Donnell) goes undercover; Nate Getz (Peter Cambor) discovers the truth about Special Agent Macy and Gibbs' relationship.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team must work with ICE and FBI agents when a security breach results in the death of an ICE agent; Tony comes face to face with Michael Rivkin (Merik Tadros).

programme.desc: Ziva has a tense reunion with her father, the head of Mossad; Gibbs is forced to make a shocking decision.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: With the weight of the past on their minds, Gibbs and the team go back to work, with DiNozzo and McGee beginning a search for Ziva's replacement.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An investigation into the bizarre death of a Marine and two friends seems linked to Gibbs' past.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team takes a second look into a lieutenant's death after the blogger who accused them of a cover-up turns up dead.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a Marine's body surfaces halfway around the world, the investigation forces Ziva to dig up a lost chapter of her life.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a Marine known for his love of practical jokes is found dead on Halloween, the team is called in to investigate; they soon learn that his jokes may have been the reason why he was killed.

programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Ellipse Fit by LegXercise-FREE Deluxe Offer for First 300 Callers!
programme.desc: Do you spend too many hours sitting at a desk? Do you have a tough time exercising due to joint pain? Ellipse Fit will strengthen your legs, boost mobility, and improve circulation with low impact leg movement. Order NOW & claim your FREE Bonus!

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Have Thinning Hair? Keranique Can Help Regrow Beautiful, Thicker Hair!
programme.desc: If you have thinning hair or hair loss, Keranique can help regrow thicker, longer and fuller hair. Keranique is the number 1 hair regrowth system for women. Regain your confidence with beautiful, thicker and fuller hair in just 3 easy steps!

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.desc: Call today to try the high quality, low-price Audien hearing aid, risk-free! No doctor or fittings necessary.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Who Could Kill a Sweet Old Lady?
programme.desc: When Edie becomes the caregiver for a wealthy, elderly woman, she starts to suspect that someone wants her client dead -- and she's the only one standing in their way.

programme.title: I Killed Him in My Sleep
programme.desc: A woman has a violent dream about a dying man, a bloody knife in her hand, and a voice accusing her of murder. When a news report reveals a missing man who matches her dream, she's forced to confront unsettling secrets as she searches for answers.

programme.title: Yoga Teacher Killer: The Kaitlin Armstrong Story
programme.desc: Yoga instructor Kaitlin Armstrong vanishes into thin air after she's accused of killing professional cyclist Moriah Wilson in a jealous rage. On the run, Armstrong tries to alter her appearance as authorities launch a manhunt to track her down.
